title: Business Breakfast | Stock Market News | May 25, 2026 || TV5 Money

recommendations.note: 52-wk-high buying is fine; protect profit with a trailing stop-loss
recommendations.detail: A viewer who buys names like Radico whenever they hit a 52-week high asked if the strategy is sound. Kutumba Rao said it is typically a good strategy because a 52-week high happens with a reason (results/sector change), but one must confirm the change is positive and protect profit with a trailing stop-loss (e.g. Radico near its 3-year high ~Rs 3600, trail ~3250-3350). He noted this breakout method suits short/medium term; for the long term, also buy on dips.

recommendations.note: Good wealth-creator; do SIPs, do not buy only at highs
recommendations.detail: As part of the 52-week-high strategy question, Kutumba Rao named Sansera as a good long-term wealth-creating company. He advised buying on dips and doing SIPs rather than only at highs, while using a trailing stop-loss to protect profits on breakouts.

Kutumba Rao named Hitachi as a good long-term wealth-creating company in response to the 52-week-high strategy question, recommending SIPs and buying on dips rather than chasing only the highs. He paired it with a trailing-stop-loss discipline for the breakout/short-term portion.

Kutumba Rao listed 'Bans' among the names worth doing SIPs in (alongside Hitachi and Sansera) when validating a viewer's 52-week-high buying strategy. He advised accumulating on dips for the long term rather than only at highs. (Company name approximate from auto-captions.)

recommendations.note: Hold, do not book the loss; huge order book, solar EPC reviving
recommendations.detail: A viewer at a ~25% loss (bought at Rs 435) asked whether to book the loss or hold. Kutumba Rao said hold and do not book the loss. He cited a prior interview with promoter Raghvendra showing a huge order book, and noted solar EPC companies are picking up again. The viewer entered high (~Rs 100 above the current price), so patience is needed.

recommendations.note: Long-term buy; renewables space; 5-yr 100% return plausible
recommendations.detail: Asked by a viewer wanting ~100% returns in five years on Waaree Energy and CDSL, Kutumba Rao said that kind of return is plausible over five years going by the last three years' performance. He noted Waaree is in the renewable energy space, supporting the possibility of strong long-term returns.

recommendations.note: Long-term buy; steady capital-markets business, no problem
recommendations.detail: In the same answer (Waaree Energy and CDSL, targeting 100% in five years), Kutumba Rao said CDSL is fine for the long term: capital markets keep generating volumes and new listings, and CDSL has a steady (paid) business with no problem. He judged a 5-year 100% return possible.
